CustomField.description: For use with Lottery Reporting TASK0198615. This is the application level calculated by the system. It is possible this does not match their currently assigned app in field "Lottery Application Level" because it has not been reviewed yet. During some times of the year, calculated applications are not automatically applied to a donor's final application level due to requiring a review first.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the application level calculated by the system. It is possible this does not match their currently assigned app in field "Lottery Application Level" because it has not been reviewed yet. During some times of the year, calculated applications are not automatically applied to a donor's final application level due to requiring a review first.
CustomField.label: Proposed Lottery Application Level
